description_long: This is a female adult figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. She has long, straight hair that falls past her shoulders and a neutral facial expression. She is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and a knee-length skirt with a subtle gradient effect. Her footwear consists of mid-calf boots with a slight heel, and her overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style. The figure's proportions and attire are consistent with a young adult pedestrian commonly seen in city environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed female adult with long straight hair, wearing a sleeveless top, knee-length skirt, and mid-calf boots, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, sleeveless top, skirt, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the side silhouette of the outfit and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the top, and the skirt, with both arms extended and hair covering the upper back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and the side outline of the clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and knee-length skirt with mid-calf boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
